title: Newton-Raphson Root Finding
mermaid: graph TD A1[Define f(x) and f'(x)] --> B1[Set initial guess x0] B1 --> C1[Set tolerance ε and max iterations N] C1 --> D1[Initialize iteration counter i = 0] D1 --> E1[Calculate f(xi) ] E1 --> F1[Calculate f'(xi) ] F1 --> G1{{"|f'(xi) == 0?"|"}} G1 -- Yes --> H1[Singular point: Choose new x0] H1 --> B1 G1 -- No --> I1[Calculate xi+1 = xi - f(xi) / f'(xi) ] I1 --> J1[Iteration i = i + 1] J1 --> K1{{"|i > N?"|"}} K1 -- Yes --> L1[No convergence: Return xi+1 as best estimate] K1 -- No --> M1{{"|abs(xi+1 - xi) < ε?"|"}} M1 -- Yes --> N1[Root found: Return xi+1] M1 -- No --> O1[xi = xi+1] O1 --> E1 style A1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff style B1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff style C1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff style H1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff style D1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 style G1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 style K1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 style M1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 style E1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff style F1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff style I1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff style J1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff style L1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff style N1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff style O1 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
entities: Set tolerance ε and max iterations N
{"|f'(xi) == 0?"|"}}G1 -- Yes --> H1[Singular point: Choose new x0
{"|i > N?"|"}}K1 -- Yes --> L1[No convergence: Return xi+1 as best estimate
{"|abs(xi+1 - xi) < ε?"|"}}M1 -- Yes --> N1[Root found: Return xi+1
